source.cookbook: Black Rican Vegan   Fire Plant Based Recipes from
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
COMPRA LIST
1 lb (455 g) oyster mushrooms
4 cups (500 g) all-purpose flour, divided
2 cups (485 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
¼ cup (60 ml) hot sauce
3 tbsp (27 g) potato starch
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp Cajun seasoning
1 tsp onion powder
1 tsp dried oregano
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp salt, plus more to taste
4 cups (946 ml) vegetable oil

Serves 4
ingredients.original:
COMPRA LIST
1 lb (455 g) oyster mushrooms
4 cups (500 g) all-purpose flour, divided
2 cups (485 ml) unsweetened nondairy milk
¼ cup (60 ml) hot sauce
3 tbsp (27 g) potato starch
1 tsp garlic powder
1 tsp Cajun seasoning
1 tsp onion powder
1 tsp dried oregano
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp salt, plus more to taste
4 cups (946 ml) vegetable oil

Serves 4

ingredients.item: Wash your oyster mushrooms and peel them apart into wing-sized pieces. In a medium-sized bowl, combine 2 cups (250 g) of the flour, the nondairy milk and the hot sauce, and whisk thoroughly; this is your wet batter. In another medium-sized bowl, combine the remaining 2 cups (250 g) of flour, potato starch, garlic powder, Cajun seasoning, onion powder, oregano, paprika and salt, and whisk thoroughly; this is your dry batter.
ingredients.original: Wash your oyster mushrooms and peel them apart into wing-sized pieces. In a medium-sized bowl, combine 2 cups (250 g) of the flour, the nondairy milk and the hot sauce, and whisk thoroughly; this is your wet batter. In another medium-sized bowl, combine the remaining 2 cups (250 g) of flour, potato starch, garlic powder, Cajun seasoning, onion powder, oregano, paprika and salt, and whisk thoroughly; this is your dry batter.
